problem id: 76fbfa25
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01010001 -> 00110100
  00101001 -> 00101010
  10000110 -> 11100001
  10010011 -> 01000100
  10101100 -> 10101011
  10011100 -> 10100111
  00110110 -> 11001101
  10111101 -> 10001111
  11011001 -> 00010110

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 10101101
